reviews.review_text: We are from Qld .great facility,nice and friendly staff, well maintained .great place for a base. Great to see continued improvements being done

Excellent location and  a peaceful place for a relaxing getaway. The park and facilities are exceptionally clean and tidy. The staff are always friendly and welcoming. We always look forward to coming back.
Highly recommend !!
The room was clean and tidy. We will come back again.
Ensuite camp sites are great. Good location and good playground for the kids

Excellent service and a fantastic place for families and kids to play. Everything was very clean, including all public facilities such as the toilets, play areas, and family rooms. The staff were very kind and welcoming. Our room was super clean and comfortable as well. Highly recommend and would definitely come back again!

Calming place, great views around Great place to stay in and awesome staff. The inside of cabins are neat and clean.
And on the top gaming room, karts, bbq, mini golf all great.
Overall awesome experience

Clean and Comfortable. We stayed in the Alpine Studio, which included all amenities. Lots of activities to keep the little ones busy. The jumping pillow, games room, bike karts, and mini golf were our favourite. Excellent spot to stop for autumn colours and located right next to the Murray to Mountain bike trail. Would recommend and looking forward to returning again soon.

Great holiday park just outside Porepunkah. The Alpine Cabin was clean and comfortable, park facilities were great, staff were amazing. Only a short drive from Bright. Plenty of things to keep the kids busy too - playground, games room, mini putt, bikes, and a pool.  We can't wait to come back
The Location is Best with River Vieaw and rooms Are Awesome. Thanks to Steph and Anthony for their Great service.

My wife & I extremely disappointed with the service at this park. We are retired & expected to have a quiet holiday- off peak. On our 3rd day the graders & cement breaking machines went to work early in the morning. The noise was terrible. I understand that 6 new cabins were going in. Fine but why not tell us.!! Putting us behind the work was incredibly stupid. We eventually had enough & so had the people opposite.  We both packed up & left the park. We lost 2 days but found a park that ensures peace and quiet. You can't tell me Bright / Porepunkah C/park didn't know what was going to happen  - heavy machinery, plumbers & electricians need to be booked. I find this completely deceitful & poor on behalf of the park owners. My wife's return to childhood memories wasn't a happy event.
It seems the older caravaners are redundant & this park is chasing the people who have disposable incomes.
Very disappointed.
Chris Davies.
Friendly staff cabin very clean and well equipped kitchen

We booked a slab van site for a few nights and are delighted with the property under new management!

These guys have clearly spent a lot of time, effort, energy and money to improve the experience for guests to the park. The icing on the cake for us was the new dump point. Thank you. This was always a consideration for us and you’ve taken care of it.

The amenities were also pretty schmick. Thanks. So nice to walk into a warm bathroom when it’s so cool outside.
Nice stay. Clean toilet and shower. Beautiful nature surrounds you.

Having visited this park several times before, the recent overhaul is a breath of fresh air. They’ve traded the run-down annuals for a much more open, organic feel. The facilities are exceptionally clean, and the overall atmosphere is fantastic. We’ll definitely be back—this is a must-stay in the Bright area."
Stayed in our caravan at this great little park.  Rail trail across the road, wonderful staff and really nice sites.
The campsite is well-equipped and beautiful, especially when all the trees in the area turn yellow and red.

We’ve just enjoyed five nights here and re-booked again for even longer next year. Well maintained, generous sized sites with heaps of room to spread out and take in the beautiful surrounds. Service at reception was exceptional - such a warm welcome after a long drive and always happy to help out.

The lady at the front desk is very kind and not ever grumpy. The pool is heated and the jumping pillow is fun and everyone can go on it (9 year old feedback).

It’s perfect for kids of all ages. The view of the river is beautiful (12 year old feedback).
Stayed at an en-suite van site for 5 nights and I highly recommend this park. Very well maintained park run by a very friendly helpful team. We will be back !!
Loved it. Be back next year
Powered site a few different times. Staff are excellent, sites are nice and roomy. Amenities are always clean and serviceable. Recommend this park.
Great family holiday, picturesque views and a beautiful bike trail for the family as well as swimming for the children and amazing service from the park owners

Amazing retreat to enjoy with my husband, great views a perfect getaway from my busy life and the service was outstanding as well as the cosy rooms I will certainly be back thank you Nicol for catering for all my needs.

It was perfect for us as a base while we explored the region. We chose a quiet time but were still well looked after.
Clean functional room which served us well.

We stayed here for 2 days. The park is about a 10 minute drive to Bright. Staff are very friendly and helpful. The cabin we stayed in was budget style, probably built around 1970s with a tiny TV sitting atop the fridge. There’s a 4 burner stove and basic kitchen. The bedroom had a very comfortable king size bed. The bathroom was squishy with a tiny basin and and enclosed shower. This cabin would be ideal for budget conscious travelers.
This place is incredible. So nice. I now understand why people keep coming back.

A great park, with lovely, shady trees and lots of fun for the kids.
Don't forget your bikes! Minimal concrete for scooters, but lots of paths and tracks and a pump/ bmx track for bikes.
River access is very steep- hard to get down to and up out of.

We recently stayed at holiday park wuth a few families and it was fantastic! The facilities were great, clean kitchen, spotless bathrooms maintained all throughout the day, plenty of areas for kids to play and very helpful staff. The park is a good enough size that its not so big you get lost, location is not far from all key attractions but away from the crowded areas for some peace and quiet.  Love the campground and would definitely come again!

Bright Porepunkah holiday park is a beautiful place for a relaxing getaway. The park is exceptionally clean and tidy, and you can really tell it’s well cared for. The staff are incredibly friendly and welcoming, always happy to help and extremely accommodating. The location is perfect, peaceful yet close enough to everything you need for a great trip away. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and will definitely be back. Highly recommend!
Great location Nice and clean Very helpful staff. Highly recommend
Quiet, spacious, amazingly clean, friendly staff and a great location for our family getaway. Could not recommend highly enough
Had a great stay! Park was very clean and staff were incredible. Will definitely be back.

I think as always there is a little skepticism when it comes to new owners of a caravan park.

how will things change? Will it be the same? But I can assure you that Anthony and the team are crushing it! The staff are super friendly! Organised and clean! Seeing each site get raked before new arrivals, watering down the roads for the dust to very clean facilities!The team is doing an outstanding job! Having spoken to Anthony he has assured me that the park I love, the park I have been coming to for 25 years will stay the same! Yes modernisation is going to be happening! But that’s a key part of a great park!

Can not wait to keep coming back!

Few days in, very bad wifi does not work, TV is poor with every few minutes cuts out and can’t watch anything, shower has such reduced flow that it’s not possible to use… these are all fairly basic essentials super disappointed …

We are here for cycling and the cabins are perfect. Everything is here that you need - good kitchen to prepare breakfast. Check in was super easy and staff are very accomodating. And it's reasonably priced.
We will stay here again as it is literally on the bike-path to  Mount Buffalo.
Approximate to Bright and nearby Great Alpine road. A great value option for a few days of stay. Booked a cabin and it suits our family well.
Fantastic place
Great for caravan stay
Beautiful place to visit, rooms were clean and tidy! The view of the mountains were amazing, definitely will be back.
This is relaxing place to stay. The park is so peaceful and the staff are amazing. I would definitely come back. It’s got everything you need to keep the kids happy and not to far from bright.

We had a fantastic stay at Bright Porepunkah Holiday Park! The park was clean, well set out and the staff were very friendly. The team went the extra mile to make our stay memorable. Highly recommend!

STARS
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

5 Stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We’ve been staying here over the past little while and it’s been awesome watching the park come to life. The changes the owners are making are turning this into a fantastic family holiday spot.

You can really see the focus on creating memories for kids — the new jumping pillow is going to be a massive hit! The park just keeps getting better every time we visit.

Highly recommend for anyone looking for a relaxed, family-friendly getaway in a beautiful spot.

— Jason Hyman

As someone who is pretty fussy about where I stay (especially when it comes to cleanliness), I was genuinely impressed by how spotless and well presented this park is. Everything feels fresh, neat and well cared for — which instantly makes for a more relaxing stay.

The facilities are fantastic for families. The jumping pillow is already a huge hit, the playground is amazing, and the pool area is the kind of spot where kids make memories and parents can actually exhale.

It’s also been great watching the park continue to evolve into a wonderful holiday space with so much heart behind it. Every visit brings something new.

Clean, family-friendly, and transforming into something really special — highly recommend.
— Mel Wilke

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
This Holiday Park is an absolute gem! The staff here go above and beyond — so welcoming, kind, and full of local knowledge that makes your stay even better. You can tell they genuinely care about their guests, and it gives the whole park such a friendly, relaxed vibe.

The park itself is beautifully kept — spacious sites, pristine facilities, and surrounded by stunning scenery that makes you feel instantly on holiday. It’s the perfect base to explore Bright and the surrounding region — close enough to everything but peaceful enough to completely unwind.

Spotless, scenic, and superbly run — Five-star in every way! Can’t wait to come back.
Thank you for a great stay! Clean, friendly owner, great place for family's. We will definitely be back. Thanks again.
No longer going there

Stayed at this camping ground on a powered site in our RV. Loved the games room and extra large jumping pillow for my son who liked it alot. Loads of showers in the amenities block and handy to snow hire places as a stop over before heading up the mountains.
Perfect family holiday park!
We stayed her for a light in our way to Mt Hotham. Clean cabin with generous amenities - lots of towels tea and coffee and good kitchen supplies. Loved it
I love coming here, it’s like a haven after a 4 hour drive. Hosts look after you and room is welcoming when we arrive, which is always in winter.

Nice rooms, beautiful location, good facilities, but was just too crowded. Have stayed here a few times now doing the camping, but the most recent time we decided to book the poolside Villa. Was WAY more crowded than I remembered, and a party was going until 11pm at night, way past the noise curfew. Will probably not be back.
Comfortable and clean. Used accommodation to get to ski fields at Falls Creek.

We stayed here for a weekend trip to the snow at Mount Buffalo. The staff were amazing and really helpful. The cabins were perfect- clean and cozy. It’s a short drive into town with a good pub and bakery. Lots of things for the kids to do like pedal carts, pool, playground/jumping pillow and a game room.

Great location , not to busy for a tourist location.
Wonderful ammenities.
The local area is great to explore, the snow at Mt Buffalo was great

We enjoyed our stay at this park. We arrived a bit early and were kindly allowed to check in before the official time. When we entered the cabin, the heater had already been turned on to keep it nice and warm, which we really appreciated, especially on a cold winter day. The cabin had everything we needed, and we had a great time travelling to Mt Hotham and Falls Creek for the snow.

Lovely and beautiful holiday park. The staff were smiley, attentive and so nice. We are still quite new to this camping thing and they came to check in on us a few times. We booked the ensuite campsite and it was perfect. The showers were great, very clean and neat. Only suggestion would be having clothing hooks installed in the ensuite so that we can hang our clothes before showers.

The park was also very quiet and peaceful. It is about 1 hr drive to Mount Hotham for snow and 30 mins to a trout salmon farm. We love it and will be back again!
Excellent room. Loved it. Sure place to stay next time.

Had a wonderful experience with loved ones.
Spacious, clean and complete basic necessities..
highly recommended for families and friends

My family - 4 adults and 2 young children had a 3 night stay in the 3 bedroom cottage this week.  The staff were welcoming and extremely helpful, the cottage was warm and inviting and the facilities were excellent. We thoroughly enjoyed our visit and will be coming back again.
Thank you .
Fabulously clean and comfy apartments
Had an amazing experience staying there. Staff was super friendly:)

We enjoyed 3 nights at Big 4 Porepunkah. Very friendly staff, good facilities & spotlessly clean. We have stayed at many caravan parks over the past 18 plus years, have never seen anyone clean the tops of rubbish bins before. The staff fixed our TV issues & could not be more obliging due to my wifes health issues.

Sheree, was a great host, friendly and a great communicator.
Holiday park was very tidy.
Accommodation was great value, very clean and spacious.

Lots of birds to photograph in the park 💜
##TheresaHollingsworthPhotography
We had a lovely 3 night stay in the 3 bedroom house. It was spotlessly clean and beds were very comfortable. The park was well maintained with a view of Mt Buffalo. Our thanks to all the staff.
Great caravan park new owners just kicked out 52 annuals with 2 months notice to have everything removed over an automated email
Great services, friendly and super welcoming! clean, lots of amenities and things to keep the kids happy and entertained. Close to so many site seeing locations! Thank you!
It is a very nice place especially for families with children.

We had such a great time. So relaxing and the place is perfect in between myrtleford and bright. Our cabin was spotless. Staff were incredibly warm and accommodating to our requests. Just what we needed for the long weekend. We'll be back for sure!

What a beautiful park, we stayed here for 5 nights. We had an ensuite site which was spacious and very clean. All the facilities were very well looked after abd the grounds are beautiful, and the staff were very friendly. We will definitely be back.
Love love love, kids didn’t want to leave.
We had a powered site. But lovely people.  Great camp kitchen and amenities. Would return there anytime.

Fabulous place! We were booked in for only a few days and extended to one week. We were in a lovely quiet grassy spot for our tent that overlooked the forest. Short drive to Bright to ride mystics; short drive to other areas for gravel rides. Excellent clean amenities, great camp kitchen - everything you need, lovely staff. Defo coming back bro!!

We were staying in our caravan the sites were a good size power and water  close to the site . Amenities were older but very clean .Reception was handle quickly and professionally . Would be definitely stay here again and tell friends about their park. Nightly cost was good .
Nice spot very clean shower cubicle a bit small but ok

Great park. there were 15 of us so it got complicated and Sue was so great and so helpful.  great position for getting around the area. fantastic cabin. we had the “cottage” - very comfortable. Highly recommend.

Cabin was clean and tidy. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Park was in a great location to ride the rail trail. The park is close to Bright to go exploring. I will definitely recommend the park for accommodation
The couple running the park were great nothing was too much bother. We had a lovely site, the showers and toilets were clean and the camp kitchen was well equipped. Thanks for a great couple of days
Perfect location. Excellent facilities, all super clean. Friendly staff.
Ripper joint
Great park. Very quiet… great views of mt buffalo…

Very, very nice people
Happy to accommodate any requests
Been coming here for several years always look forward to seeing the owners

Stayed in a Cabin and was neat, clean and had everything you need.

Great location in the park and view from the deck.

Owners so helpful and genuine.

Very clean and family orientated . The addition of the Dump point is greatly appreciated.
Repeat customer for many years to come ❤️
Amenities lovely & clean. Lovely quiet park, not far from town. Where made to feel welcome, would stay again.
Friendly staff, easy to book in, and unit was clean and well serviced

Outstanding customer service 👏👏👏
Brilliant facilities with something for everyone of all ages !!!
Great overnighter for cycling the nearby trial rides.

We stayed in a 2 bedroom unit. The finishings are basic but practical and everything was clean. The bathroom is very small, but was sufficient for our needs. The grounds are well maintained and the staff very friendly and accommodating. The location is right next to the bike track so very conveniently located. We loved our stay and want to return for another weekend of cycling.
very nice spot to camp with the family, very clean facilities, decent sized pool and playground for the kids to play on.
Awesome to be out of the Bright just a little bit. Nothing was a hassle and our kids loved it.
Very happy staff member
We stayed 4 nights in a powered site, the location is great and the management team were friendly and very approachable. Overall it suited our needs and would recommend to all.
Excellent park for our young kids, peaceful, safe and the staff were fantastic.  We’ll be back!
Beautiful place to visit. Not only you do your camping but also all the nearby site seeing.

I love this holiday park! The location is perfect for the best experience in Bright/Porpunkah, the rooms are very nice and fitting for our family. The services in the park are also great! The experiences inside the park are also great fun with the games room, awesome pool and playgrounds/go-karts/mini golf just footsteps away. Thanks!

Fantastic stay at this big 4. First time here and we will definitely be back! Very family friendly with plenty of activities for the kids to do within the park. All facilities are very well maintained and clean. We stayed in the 3 bed house which had plenty of room, lovely big beds and a full size kitchen, living area, laundry and bathroom. Great for a large family. The park has a nice vibe and the people that run it are very welcoming and friendly. Thank you for a wonderful stay.
Camped here for 2 nights.  It was our first time in the area. Lovely park with all the amenities you need and close to everything.

Love Porepunkah Big4. It is such a beautiful location with a stunning view of Mount Buffalo to wake up to, the river only meters away from camping and the rail trail access across the road. The staff are lovely and facilities are clean. Only thing that would be a beneficial change would be new washing machines as you need to fill up with buckets yourself or wait a ridiculously long time for them to fill.

This was our first time camping at this lovely caravan park. We were in tents staying for a week on a shady powered site
The grounds and gardens are very pretty and well maintained. We found  all the amenities to be excellent. The staff are very friendly and helpful. A great location. We will be returning next year.

Swimming pool, and access to the river. Good clean facilities,  occasional food trucks and daily coffee van. Well managed and maintained holiday park.
A mix of camping areas and on site accommodation.
Vehicle areas provide ample opportunity for kids to ride bikes.
We enjoyed our stay. Bed comfy, pool close, bike path close. Weather good. Cabin 7 well located and generally roomy for two people;  bathroom / toilet tight fit.

We stayed in the 3BR house, very comfortable, some furnishings are probably getting a bit dated but I would definitely stay again - the park facilities were excellent and in particular the staff members were genuinely friendly and helpful.

A beautiful, scenic and peaceful caravan park with lovely facilities. A 5 min walk down to the beautiful ovens River, perfect to swim in on a hot day if you prefer something more natural than the park pool!
Great holiday park. Clean and well kept. Great location. Great place for camping.

Rooms were great.
And well equipped with holiday stay
Services were amazing too

I would have liked if things which are available for purchase can be Self purchase facility enabled

As caravaners we can’t comment on rooms but the site was lovely with lots of lovely shade and trees. The bathrooms are immaculate and the staff are very welcoming and friendly.
Highly Recommended
We had a wonderful stay, the facilities are clean and well looked after. Staff are friendly. Kids can’t wait to go back

We had a wonderful stay at the Caravan Park! It was a perfect spot for our family, with plenty of space for the kids to play and enjoy the outdoors. The location is peaceful, and the facilities are well-maintained, making it a great choice for a relaxing getaway. One small suggestion for improvement: the powered campsite was located near the fence, and there was barbed wire along it. While it didn’t cause any issues for us, it might be something to consider for the safety of younger visitors in the future. We were concerned about injuries to our kids all the time of stay. Overall, we had a fantastic time and would definitely recommend it for families.
Great park to stay at, staff are very friendly and helpful. going out of their way to be of assistance. Facilities clean and modern. Definitely stay there again
Great accommodation and very helpful and friendly staff.  A little bit out of the way but a nice relaxing park.
We stayed in our caravan on a slab site. The sites had poor drainage which made them rather muddy.
Had a pleasant stay. Friendly staff and clean amenities. Quite spacious sites compared to most caravan parks in the area.
excellant spot for wedding at Feathertop winery. close to bright and porpunkah, sensational homemade pies at the bakery punkah bakery.

As below, mostly out exploring and doing stuff.
Once back into the park it is fairly quiet, clean and very kid friendly.
Not.a big park with lots of trees so it keeps a fairly peaceful space restful. 😊😊👍👍

What a fantastic picturesque place. Our powered ensuite site was fantastic, right outside the camp kitchen. The facilities were clean the wifi fantastic considering we were there during a busy period, the staff were great very welcoming

The only Negative I had was that the TV antenna connection that is supplied doesn’t work and we had no TV reception but we made do with conversations 😂

Overall I would highly recommend staying at Big4 Porepunkah

The staff are Amazing to deal with! They help where they can and are all round lovely people
The cabin we stay in is also perfect for a family nice,clean and well looked after highly recommended 👌
See you 4 in 12 months 😀

Amazing Caravan Park. So peaceful and beautiful. Perfectly Maintained and clean in all areas of the park. Huge credit to the team for a clean and relaxing stay.
Welcoming staff, that were all so friendly and approachable.
Can't wait to return. We didn't want to leave.
We absolutely love staying here. So much to do for the kids without it being crazy busy. Such a beautiful spot. Highly recommend.

Amazing scenery
Amazing service
Amazing amenities/ heated pool.
We have just travelled around nsw and Victoria from SA, this is by far the best park we have stayed in from over 14 different parks.
Honestly Amazing stuff 👏
Thankyou!

This park remains easily at the top of the list for the most friendly and helpful family run park we've ever visited. Becoming more attracted to caravan travel, and whilst getting further away from home on school holidays, BIG 4 Porepunkah is most definitely our local go-to. Away from the shenanigans and European SUV's of Bright, this park is where you want to be  - Marcus Reid and kids 🤙👍👊😊

The weather, location and surrounds were perfect and met all our needs. The outside lawns and facilities are beautiful and were kept very neat, clean and tidy.The staff were delightful! Nothing too much trouble and very accomodating. A bit of shade around the pool would have been welcomed though.
We were always greeted with a smile and bright hello by staff. Any small issue was attended to very swiftly. The cabin we were in was perfectly located for our needs and presented very cleanly. The bedding was very comfortable and in good supply. Bedside lamps a little dull in light so an adjustable one for reading, could be a good idea. The bathroom a bit squishy, but manageable. Towels were good quality dried well and basic toiletries ok.  The kitchen basic, but met our needs. Maybe a few airtight containers for left overs would be helpful.  Outside furniture comfortable and again met our needs. Old small bbq at cabin should be retired/replaced but we didn’t need it as we used the big camp kitchen which was very well set up. All up a fabulous break and congratulations to and Thankyou to the owners and staff for making it so enjoyable. Our family made wonderful memories while there which you contributed to.
I highly recommend!
We hope to hope to return and will spread the word.  !!🙌🥰 regards Fiona S and clans.

I enjoyed my stay but was disappointed to see no equipment at the mini golf, as well as the games room being open yet when I wanted to play pool, we went to get the pool cues and balls from reception but reception was closed. Doesn’t really make sense.
Great park, and cabins were very clean.  Will stay again
The room was very clean and comfortable. It was set amongst the pine forest with a very short walk to the river. I recommend Big4 Porepunkah if you are seeking a quiet and relaxing stay

Great caravan park within 10 mins drive to Bright.  Staff very friendly and park and facilities are very clean. I had my caravan on a large powered site. Staff very helpful for reversing of the caravan if you are a bit unsure.  Next to main road but I didn't hear much traffic noise.
We had a brilliant location and the park was a well maintained and the weather was perfect thank you great people

A nice quiet park, even though a fair few people were there for the long weekend. Kids had a great time. Cabin a bit small (no huge issue) but in future will just book something bigger. Staff friendly and had great knowledge of things to do. Will certainly return in the future

We stayed in two of the unpowered sites. The morning of checkout was raining and the staff told us to go out for breakfast and let the camper and swag dry out. This was a great help as we avoided having to erect everything at home to dry.
The staff were really freiendly and flexible. It's a beautiful spot. Heaps of things to do for kids and adults alike. Mountain bike track the kids loved, playground, pool, river, games room, kitchen. What more could you want. We will be back.

Are stay was fantastic, we took our caravan for it first trip.
All the staff were very helpful and friendly, nothing was too much trouble. The grounds are kept immaculate and plenty of stuff for the kids to do. All the amenities are spotless as well, highly recommend a stay @BIG4 Porepunkah Holiday Park.
Thank you , Nicola and Rob
Great location. Awesome views
The room was very clean, tidy and had all the items that should be there, washing machine, hair dryer,   pans for cooking etc.
Staff are very friendly nice quite park only 10 minutes to Bright.  Very clean amenities.

We stayed at the caravan park in a tent. Park was very clean, well maintained however bathroom facilities outdated.
Very kid friendly, and beautiful views. Love the walk through the Forrest and down to the beautiful river.
Staff were very friendly and knowledgeable.
Thank you for making our stay a very pleasurable one.

This was a great place to stay.  My first time in a Big4 caravan park and it couldn't have been nicer.  The cabin was clean and comfortable.  The staff were very helpful, relaxed and welcoming.  They even put the heating on to ensure when I arrived the cabin was warm.  It was a very cold day.  I had a lovely time.
Great place to stay, perfect location, amazing staff and the cabin was just what I was after. Will be back next winter
The two bedroom cottage was fantastic. They supplied us with a porta cot and had great facilities for kids. The cottage was really clean and comfortable. Such a nice spot near the river too.

We were a little distressed to find that there wasn't enough hot water to service a group of 7 in a cabin suited for up to 9. We found that all of the items (paper towel, kitchen items) in the cabin were bare basics and low quality. The $10 table tennis bats for the games room were kept under lock & key, as were the ancient pool cues - which we were then unable to return during the opening hours of the kiosk before heading up the mountain that morning. When my 13-year old went to return them as soon as we got back, she was made to feel bad about it by the lady behind the desk who also made *the 13-year old* sign a slip to say we would be charged a late fee.

Perhaps if it weren't for this last part, or for the same ladies comments about how children wreck the games room equipment when I went to pick them up - I wouldn't find the need to comment on the rest of it. In short this supposed family accommodation didn't feel like it had family at its core.

The cabin we hired was clean, tidy and functional, the location to everything we wanted to see was great. Staff were friendly and helpful and the facilities in the park were spot on. Had an very enjoyable stay.
The most amazing holiday destination and accomadation. The kids loved the snow this time around!
Very nice service

Excellent location
Villa was perfect

We had a wonderful time staying in the 3 bedroom house, spacious and comfortable!
Thankyou.
We will be back.

Very good location holiday park where we stayed for 3 nights for ski day trips to Falls Creek, lovely staff member and very friendly and supportive environment. The cabin was cozy and neat and we got pretty much everything we need for the stay.
Very helpful staff, communicated well and very accommodating.
Great holiday park and beautiful staff ready to help with all queries.  Thank you for a lovely stay! We will be back.
Nice and quiet place
I had a great experience of staying at BIG4 Porepunkah Park. Ashle was really welcoming and Helpful

The Villa was clean and well equipped. Friendly staff, pretty location, very peaceful place to relax and refresh. This is the second time we’ve stayed here and it won’t be the last. We had an issue with an electric blanket but it was quickly replaced. We really enjoyed our stay and recommend the park.
We had a great weekend stay, clean and spacious cabin, the kids loved the pump track, playgroud and go karts! Very friendly staff too! We will be back ☺️☺️
From the time of booking, and at our arrival the same friendly greeting applied. The facilities are spotless, the camp kitchen would be the best equipped I have seen. A great weeks stay.
Fantastic amenities. Staff were amazing. Nothing was too much trouble. Would highly recommend this park. 😊

The most beautiful park for nature walks, kids exploring, 5 mins from Bright town centre, 2 mins from Punka pub, always clean & fresh bedding & clean facilities. Highly recommend, have stayed 2 years in a row & will return.

We stayed in the 2 bedroom cottage which had loads of room for our family of 4 adults and 2 teenagers. Other family members were also staying in the park and the cottage was big enough for all of us to use as our hub for the weekend. The heater was on when we arrived which was lovely. The surroundings are beautiful, the cottage was clean and is fully equipped with everything we needed and it's just a short drive into Bright. The staff are friendly and were very helpful. We will definitely be back.

We stayed at an ensuite site. An excellent camp kitchen was right next to the site & was well stocked & clean.
The ensuite was lovely, possibly recently renovated.
The park itself is set amongst a variety of trees, which provided such a colourful canopy. There is also a beautiful forest at the back boundary of the park. The staff were just lovely, they even helped jump start my van. I highly recommend staying in this beautiful park. Thanks for a lovely stay.
Friendly staff, efficient service  , well appointed cabin. Beautiful surrounds

In general the park is very good, the toilets camp kitchen are very very clean.  The location is great for bike riding, but it is about 2 kilometers from Porepunka,  if walking.   The TV reception is very poor, but so are 2 of the other caravan parks in Porepunka.    The lack of a dump point, and no free ones within 15 kilometers,  is very disappointing..

Friendly helpful staff
.

Fabulous caravan park. Narelle and Mark were the best managers we have come across in our travels.
They were so friendly and came and visited us quite a few times to make sure we had everything we needed. Nothing was too much trouble. They even offered to take a photo of our group down by the beautiful river. The park was clean and well cared for.
The park is set on the river and you can walk into Bright and Porpunka.
Cabins were great, clean and roomy. Convenient location for our weekend
Very clean , friendly stuff
Beautiful area and well located near river and towns. The stay was quiet being this time of the year. Enjoyed our stay.

Great customer service, clean and tidy kitchen and bathroom but at $57 a night for unpowered in April for 2 people in a tent it's too expensive for what you get. Which is a dusty campsite with no grass with a lot of main road traffic noise.

Really great park for kids, has a nice playground, can hire Billy carts and trikes which was cool!
Caravan spot was a little tight to get into but a nice location. Facilities are dated but very clean. Staff were very friendly and accommodating.
We will be back. Thanks.
Very nice park,nothing  was a hassle, showers  and toilets 100%clean,hot water was terrific, staff very abliging .ten out of ten.
Great park, sites and scenery is perfect. Firewood was delivered to our campsite, great service. Will definitely book again.
Park had everything we needed

Very friendly staff and the park was so clean and everything was organised.
A great spot for all ages.
This was our first camping experience in a tent at a age of 57yo and I enjoyed every minute of it.

We had a beautiful stay here on a slabbed en-suite site. Whilst unused for our short stay, it was fantastic to have our own washing machine/dryer available in the en-suite if needed. My kids loved the pump track and mini golf. The short picturesque walk to the river from the campsite is so lovely too, great for a picnic! All of the facilities were clean, the camp kitchen was well stocked with all you need and the park was nice and quiet as we stayed off peak. Thanks for a great little getaway!

Best ensuite site we ever stayed. The ensuite comes with a heater and washing machine,  laundry powder, laundry basket and clothes airer were provided too!  The concrete site is spacious and whole park was quiet after dark. We will definitely recommend this park to our friends.
Beautiful spot with friendly family feel.  Great amenities.  Would definitely recommend to anyone.
Great place to stay . The owners keep the place immaculately clean and tidy and  they are lovely people . They really make you feel welcome.

What a lovely place to stay and such wonderful service what more could you ask for! The accommodation was very clean and well maintained. The facilities were well maintained and the staff friendly and very helpful. We will definitely be back. Thank you for a wonderful stay

I stayed on a powered slab site with my campervan. There was a huge “step” from the dirt to concrete slab - probably around 3 inches so had to rev the engine pretty high to get up to the slab..
Service from the office was good checking in late.
Location was ok - lots of noisy kids (I’m a big4 member and probably the noisiest I’ve stayed at). Also on the main road which was noisy especially when trucks passed.

The park offers a safe environment for children.  The park has great facilities for families.  My granddaughter enjoyed paddling in the river, the heated pool and the bike pump track.  The staff were excellent, helpful and friendly.

I highly recommend this holiday park. It was a long journey to be there from my place. However it is worth. Kind staff,  Tidy every facilities(pool, kitchen, bathroom etc.) Hope I would be there soon again.

Playground could do with a fence & gates so it can be locked at night same as the pool.
There is too much noise at night as kids continue to play on the playground after dark whilst the park rules state that this is not allowed.
Also quite a few bikes being ridden around the park after dark.
Have been coming to this park for over 20 years & am noticing noise levels at night have been gradually increasing over the years as people flout the rules & do not supervise their kids, particularly on the playground where there are camp sites in close proximity.
We have stayed in your park for the last few years and We loved staying at your park over this Easter/School holiday break. The facilities are always clean. Staff are very friendly.

Comfortable deluxe cabin opposite swimming pool.  Cabin was spotlessly clean and well equipped.  TV was much too small given today's big screen TV'S that are so cheap and WiFi was  poor.  We did however enjoy our stay.

A wonderful caravan park with great amenities and friendly staff. This is a perfect caravan park if you have kids as there is a pump track, swimming pool, soccer field/net and plenty of room to ride their bikes around. A great distance from busy Bright yet close enough to ride into town using the bike path. If you are an avid cyclist it is also located perfectly to access many great rides.
Highly recommend and will be visiting again.

Stayed on caravan powered site 4 nights. The park is layed out lovely lots of  beautiful shaded trees very clean amenities. Lovely walk to clean flowing river, not deep but cooled you down to sit in on hot days. We are bike riders and found this a great park to bike ride in both directions, (love all the trail rides around area). Note to owners the taps by our site (57 and 58) leaked. Would be nice when hedge by road side thickens and gets taller to help with blocking out road traffic noise.  Thanks camp owners will definitely come back.
Nice and clean, amenities good, friendly service. Fantastic to have own BBQ. Would stay again

Had the best 4 days/nights.
Ensuite powered site is really clean.
Communal toilets/showers are also clean.
Thank you for another lovely stay in our cozy cabin.  We have noticed a few improvements to the Park since our last visit, well done!  Thank you for your friendly and efficient service.
Porepunkah is a beautiful place. We had a lovely stay in our teardrop under shady trees.

Relaxing stay for a long weekend with friends! Well spaced campsites, right near the river. The staff were very friendly, amenities were clean and some nice little touches (like fresh tea towels in the kitchen). Only downside was a bit of noise from the road. We would come back 😊
So very friendly. A very clean and tidy park. We were impressed with the size of the slab for our caravan. Lots of shade! We will be back again.
Perfect spot for a getaway with family. Friendly staff, clean facilities, great views. Nice and close to Bright and Porepunkahs riverside parks.
The holiday park was quiet, we stayed in delux cabin 2 and it was absolutely perfect. We had a wonderful stay

Hired our first motorhome and stayed here. Had a great shady camp site right by the pool and playground. Grounds are clean and shady, staff friendly, toilet and shower block clean. Down the back near unpowered sites there is a great open grass area and access to the Ovens River which was cool.and refreshing for a play (only ankle to knee deep and very rocky but great to lay in and skim rocks). Games room has TV with Disney and Netflix, pool table, tennis table, hookey and fus ball table - only down side is no fans or air con and was very hot in there. 2 great camp kitchens. Loved this place and will be back
Good location, friendly staff, clean park
Very friendly, close to most things, lovely pool, was very quiet. We will be back.
Loved the place!. friendly staff. Very clean and the facilities were amazing !

We had the perfect long weekend here in our caravan! Lovely, spacious grounds, great ammenities, fun activities for the kids, and friendly and helpful staff. An easy ride into Porepunkah. Highly recommend!

The site was on a slope so took us ages to get our van level and the ground was rock hard so almost impossible to get pegs in. It was school holidays and no activities offered for the kids. Not sure how they got 'big4' status. Certainly not the usual standard..
Great spot for a family. Park was lovely and close to the creek . Cabin was fully equipped and relaxing . Definitely come back to stay again
Good location to visit nearby areas. Relatively quiet in park making a peaceful getaway.
Just a really clean, beautiful place to camp. Everyone was lovely, and the team at reception were attentive to anything we needed.
The holiday park locates at a very good location, which is close to Bright and Mount Buffalo. The shared bathroom and kitchen are clean and easy to use. Kids loved to stay there and had so much fun.

Great park with very clean facilities. No jumping pillow was a surprise, but not a deal breaker.
Only thing that would make this park better would be if it were a pet friendly location.
Overall, great experience for our family in a beautiful part of the state.

We loved our stay at BIG4 Porepunkah. A great location, not too far a drive from town or nearby towns. The pool is lovely and suited to all ages. The wifi struggles most of the time but otherwise it's a great place. We're going back.

All facilities well maintained, thoughtfully organised and clean.
Pool has a shade cloth and sites have shady trees.  Very friendly hosts, with caravan coffee and pop up dinner options.
Excellent camp kitchen well provided, except only one has a small upper freezer.  Could you please consider installing a freezer in the other camp kitchen?
The 100km stretch of highway does create noise in the morning ;  some sites have tree roots which bent a few tent pegs; if pouring with rain no undercover area to eat; kids said games room tv wasn't working (not a biggie for me!) but there was a tv in one camp kitchen.  Thank you for a lovely stay!
Great place for caravan
We have had a great experience with this park. We had an ensuite site. The ensuite was very spacious and our site was well positioned. The staff at the reception were helpful and polite.
Great family stay.
Beautiful Campsite, great facilities we will be back.
Wifi didn’t work. No dump point? Variable temperature showers.  All at top dollar?

We visit the park regularly and the owners are amazing. The grounds are always so neat and tidy and the facilities are clean!
Camp kitchens are fully equipped and there is even a big screen TV for watching the footy or cricket.
The park is right on the Ovens River making the hot summer days a delight.  Porepunkah and Bright are a short ride away...stop at Ringer Reef winery or the Porepunkah Pub for a sneaky drink on the way home.

A seriously good holiday park!

We were on the site opposite the large camp kitchen. It was a wonderful stay on a site of our choice. We were exactly where we wanted to be and enjoyed our week immensely.
Thank you to all involved - we were certainly taken care of.

Great campsite, all facilities were well maintained, modern and spotlessly clean. Lovely staff. We had a grassed powered site, would have given it 5 stars but it’s on the 100kmph stretch of the road to Bright and the traffic noise is noticeable.
Peaceful as its away from the centre of activity
Lovely spot! Very clean, lovely hosts. So glad I picked these cabins as a place to stay during my weekend in Porepunkah.

Toilet leaked & continually filled ,, very very noisy ,, had to turn off at side tap .
Fridge very noisy at night ..couldn’t sleep had to turn it off ..
Bed had only thick winter doona ,, much too hot for warm ish nights ..
Outside gutter in front of entrance door rusted & leaked water all over front porch ,, meaning mud everywhere ..

First impressions. Great location. Lots of shady trees.
Friendly welcome from the owners.
We stayed on a Slab site for 5 nights in our caravan.
Very Clean Amenities. Camp kitchen has all you need. Fire Pits.
A very short walk to the river.
Close to Porepunkah for a bite to eat. Short drive to Bright.
Good spot to base ourselves to tour surrounding area.
We will be back next year. Had a Great Time.
Thanks
Sue, Michael, Ashleigh and Brad
Thank you for a fantastic place to stay

We love BIG4 Porepunkah. We use a powered site for our cub camper and it's perfect. All amenities are clean and tidy. It's a beautiful location, near the river with lots of trees and Mount Buffalo in the distance.

I was travelling with a bicycle and a small tent and found the quiet location and access to the very clean amenities perfect for my needs.
The management were very friendly and went out of their way to make me feel at home.

Great place to stay :) throughly enjoyed our stay and will be back .
Nice sites and overall the park is quiet and beautiful .
Nice feel to it .

Just needs a dumping point installed  would be great then not having to go else where everywhere 2 days to empty .
Clean tidy rooms with a very pleasant outlook.  Easy access to the exceptional surrounding country and towns. A relaxed stay.

we had an EnSuite Site.
Everything was excellent.  Ensuite excellent, camp kitchen excellent
boom gate worked every time, friendly staff. I would recommend to friend's
We had an enjoyable stay in the warm and cozy 3 bedroom unit. Quick drive to Bright and lovely place to walk and explore

We had an ensuite site and wow what luxury....normal you need to have your own towels etc but all supplied (we still used our own) we felt welcome as soon as we got there till we left definitely will be back
Great holiday park. Well maintained cabins.

Quite costly in comparison to other similar locations.
Few of the power sites are quite rocky so make sure to get the right pegs as ground is not fully grass.

The staff was very well accommodating in our last minute requests.
I like the serenity however in comparison to other parks I did not like the location and vibes (opinionated)
Good place to spend time with family, convenient location and nice walking track. Friendly staff.

I would give it only two stars as i wanted to camp and this site was caravan focused. The powered camp site that i was given, was litterally surrounded by lodges and reception and it was near main entrance. The caravan sites had way better locations. It looked like they built the whole thing with huts and caravans in mind and whereever they could find an empty space around the huts, they put a powered camp site. Also, since it was right next to a busy road, car noise was a big big issue.
Apart from this, the facilities in the area were very good. toilets and bathrooms were regularly cleaned. Hot water was great. pool was great. Staff was friendly.
Quiet place in the valley outside of the bus’s town of bright, close to a pub and good WiFi. Clean and spacious amenities
Park facilities were very good.  Staff were fantastic - friendly & very responsive to all our enquiries & requests.  Great place for a family holiday.  Even the pool table is in good condition!
We will definitely be back! What a great time we had. Such a beautiful area. The facilities were great and the staff just lovely.

We really enjoyed our stay at the Big 4 in Porepunkah! It was a great location and the staff were lovely. It's got everything a family needs, especially the pool and playground located right at the back of our cabin. All the other families that were there seemed to be having a ball. Highly recommended 👌👍
Great place to stay if you are coming up for a few days

Neat and clean facility with all the amenities.
Loved the bbq facility outside cabin 😀
Surely will be my choice for my next trip to Bright and surroundings
Beautiful spot, lovely staff, very neat and tidy facilities! Great play area for the kids.

Soooooo friendly and such a clean park. There was no rubbish or bits left on the grass, camp kitchen was emasculate. Toilets and showers sparkling clean. Well worth the stay. A lot of wild life and a fantastic place to relax. Great games room. When we ski we will be staying here.
We love the place, rooms, location, service. Greatly appreciate the accommodating staff.  Overall, we enjoyed the amenities. We had a fantastic stay and we look forward to going back sometime.
Value for money

Lovely staff member greeted us and let us in to our selected rooms 15 minutes early and was given the option of late check out will definitely stay here again
Thank you :)
I like the place

Most cost effective holiday park around Bright. Less than 10mim drive to Bright where you can find Woolworths, restaurants and petrol stations, but the price is only 1/2 for the same cabin in Bright!
Not the newest cabins but very clean.
We booked pretty much every single weekend during snow season.

Experienced a power out break last week, but the park has managed  very well by getting a generator to pump the water. Don’t feel cold at all after a hot shower!
We had a great stay, our cabin was furnished well and had all that we needed. It was cold and wet outside but we were warm and cosy.

Very clean throughout. Weather was cold but cabin was warm. Reminded why electric cooktops are obsolete. Took over 30min to boil some water for pasta. BBQ wasn’t on the deck of the cabin and unable to be used as it was raining which was disappointing. Kids enjoyed the Go karts but disappointed there are no longer any jumping pillows. We managed with what the cabin offered but will look into other options such as an AirBnb next time.
Beautiful park very well looked after. Friendly staff. Really beautiful spot down by the river with an amazing view. Cabin was very clean but the heater was struggling to keep it warm.
We had a wonderful stay for 4 nights with a ensuite caravan  site  The proprietors were so helpful and the hospitality was exceptional.

We booked the ensuite sites at the holiday park. The facilities were amazing. We had a heater and a washing machine in our ensuite. The camp kitchen was right next to us with everything we needed. Flat plate BBQ, gas stove, microwave, kettle, slow cooker, utensils, cutlery, etc.. Other than the facilities Ovens river was walking distance. The owners were pleasant to talk to and helped us with what we needed. We had an amazing time in this beautiful and cosy holiday park.  Will definitely book again.
Warm, Comforting, great to deal with and really nice people. Already booked in for next year!

Overall okay experience..
the site was too muddy and no proper gravel road to the site or any night lights Which made it lil hard to walk around at night.
The owners of the park are too nosy as one of our frn booked a cabin for 5 and only 3 were staying they asked us to company them as they have space. But we stayed there till night and returned to our site at nights, we parked our car at the cabin as the road near the site was too wet or muddy.
The owners thought we were exceeding the limit and checked us at night 11 stating to keep the volume/sound low, kids were playing at that time but no loud noise or sounds. They checked with out frn next morning too and we had to again explain them.

I saw the previous reviews for this park hence included everyone who are staying to avoid any hassles but still were hassled.

We paid for more people than expected but were still hassled.

The park is at good location but we will rethink to choose it next time for our stay.

Great location near the river,cross the road from bike tracks. Very clean and well maintained park. Kids enjoyed lots of activities from playing in the playground , mini golf,games room. Very friendly staff.

Great location and spacious powered site.
Amenities well kept and clean. Good family environment and very short walk to the creek.
